result.description: L'Abattoir is a restaurant located in Vancouver's historic Gastown, offering elevated French-influenced West Coast cuisine alongside an award-winning wine list. The restaurant was built in the 19th century and is the site of Vancouver's first jail. The name L'Abattoir pays homage to the neighbourhood's colourful past.
result.address: 217 Carrall Street, Vancouver, BC, V6B 2J2, Canada
result.price_range: $65 per person with BC wine pairings an additional +$45
result.hours: Dinner: 5:00pm Tuesday - Saturday. Happy Hour: 5:00pm - 6:00pm Tuesday to Saturday

result.description: Miku Vancouver, a Michelin Guide Recommended restaurant, specializes in Aburi, or flamed-seared, sushi, which was developed nearly a century ago in Japan. Our new location offers a full bar and lounge area, waterfront patio, private dining room and full-service sushi bar. Executive Chef Kazuhiro Hayashi takes great care in combining traditional Japanese flavours and techniques with local, west coast elements to create a truly unique dining experience enjoyed by locals and visitors alike.
result.hours: Mon - Thu: 11:30 am - 10:00 pm, Fri - Sat: 11:30 am - 11:00 pm, Sun: 11:30 am - 10:00 pm

result.description: Minami is a contemporary Japanese restaurant that lies in the vibrant Yaletown community. Symbolically meaning 'Beautiful Wave' in Japanese, Minami offers a combination of Japanese and West Coast cuisine in a comfortable, rustic atmosphere.
result.hours: Monday to Sunday 5:00 pm to 9:30 pm
